## The C2PA intends to publish an official C2PA Public Trust List. Until that time, this temporary known certificate list for use by the verifier at https://contentcredentials.org/verify. The list is subject to change, and will be deprecated.
##
## This file is autogenerated and contains SHA-256 hashes of the certificates contained in https://contentcredentials.org/trust/allowed.pem in order to save bandwidth.
##
